name: Viewpoint (Trimble) Construction ERP API
what_it_does: Viewpoint (Trimble Construction) REST API for construction ERP covering project accounting, job costing, and field operations. Enables AI agents to manage job cost accounting and budget tracking for construction project financial management, handle subcontractor management and lien waiver workflow for construction procurement, access payroll and certified payroll reporting for prevailing wage compliance, retrieve equipment management and fleet tracking for construction asset management, manage project scheduling and resource allocation for construction operations, handle procurement and material management for construction supply chain, access accounts payable and receivable for construction financial operations, retrieve field data and time tracking from construction job sites, manage WIP (work-in-progress) reporting for construction financial analysis, and integrate Viewpoint ERP data with Procore, Trimble Connect, and other construction technology platforms.
use_cases: Tracking job costs from construction project agents
Managing subcontractor compliance from procurement agents
Processing certified payroll from prevailing wage agents
Analyzing WIP from construction financial agents
not_for: Manufacturing without construction project accounting workflow
Residential homebuilding without heavy civil/commercial contractor focus
Small contractors without enterprise construction ERP scale
best_when: A general contractor, subcontractor, or heavy civil contractor using Viewpoint Spectrum or Vista wants AI agents to automate job costing, subcontractor management, certified payroll, and project financial management.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Viewpoint certified payroll automation must comply with federal Davis-Bacon Act and state prevailing wage laws — automated certified payroll generation without prevailing wage classification validation creates wage theft liability. Lien waiver automation must account for state-specific conditional/unconditional lien waiver requirements; incorrect lien waiver type creates mechanic's lien rights failures. Viewpoint has multiple product lines (Spectrum, Vista, ProContractor); API surface varies by product.

auth.notes: Viewpoint uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.viewpoint.com. Webhooks for ERP events. REST API with JSON. Portland, Oregon HQ (Viewpoint). Trimble acquisition (2018, $1.2B). Trimble is public (TRMB NASDAQ). Viewpoint brands: Spectrum (mid-market), Vista (enterprise), ProContractor (small/mid). 8,000+ construction company customers. Strong in heavy civil, general contracting, and specialty subcontracting. Competes with Sage 300 CRE, Timberline, and CMiC for construction ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription plus implementation
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user and product line
pricing.notes: Portland, Oregon. Viewpoint (Trimble TRMB). Trimble acquired 2018 ($1.2B). 8,000+ construction customers. Spectrum, Vista, ProContractor product lines. Competes with Sage 300 CRE, CMiC, and Foundation Software for construction ERP.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Certified payroll automation must validate Davis-Bacon and state prevailing wage classifications; automated payroll without classification check creates wage theft liability and debarment risk
Lien waiver state law variation — 50 state-specific lien waiver requirements; automated lien waiver generation must apply correct state conditional/unconditional form and deadline
Multi-product line complexity — Viewpoint Spectrum, Vista, and ProContractor have different API surfaces; verify target product before integration

Trimble ecosystem integration — Viewpoint integrates with Trimble Connect, Trimble Buildings, and other Trimble products; inter-Trimble integration may require additional Trimble platform authentication
WIP schedule accuracy — WIP reporting is critical for contractor bonding; automated WIP without percent-complete validation creates bonding and financial reporting issues
Subcontractor insurance compliance — automated subcontractor invoice payment without current insurance certificate verification creates general contractor liability exposure
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction ERP. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Construction financial and job cost data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction ERP. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Job cost and financial data.
